justification: Official NIST press release announcing Paul Christiano's appointment as Head of AI Safety for the U.S. AI Safety Institute, explicitly naming him and the role.
Official NIST profile page for Paul Christiano listing his position as Head of Safety at the Center for AI Safety and Innovation (CAISI) within NIST.
MIT Jameel Clinic team page explicitly lists Regina Barzilay as AI Faculty Lead at the clinic.
MIT CSAIL official person page listing Regina Barzilay as a CSAIL member and faculty.
Wikipedia biography of Timnit Gebru explicitly describes her joining Apple as an intern from Stanford, working in the hardware division making circuitry for audio components.
Wikipedia article on SpaceX names Elon Musk as founder and CEO of SpaceX, explicitly documenting his leadership role.
Wikipedia article on Elon Musk's acquisition of Twitter (now X) documenting his ownership and takeover of the platform in October 2022.
Stanford Vision and Learning Lab people page listing Fei-Fei Li as co-director of SVL alongside other professors.
Harvard Kennedy School faculty page for Latanya Sweeney listing her as Daniel Paul Professor of the Practice of Government and Technology at HKS and Harvard Faculty of Arts and Sciences.
Music Ally article on the Jukedeck/ByteDance acquisition explicitly stating Newton-Rex became director of ByteDance's AI music lab after the 2019 acquisition.
Water & Music interview explicitly titles Ed Newton-Rex as 'VP Audio, Stability AI' and discusses the Stable Audio product he led.
Music Ally article on Newton-Rex's role at ByteDance/TikTok covers both his AI music lab role and his subsequent product lead role for TikTok in Europe.
Official Weizenbaum Institute portrait page for Milagros Miceli confirming her researcher role and leadership of the Data, Algorithmic Systems, and Ethics research unit there.

DAIR Institute team page for Milagros Miceli states she is 'research lead at the DAIR Institute, head of the Data, Algorithmic Systems, and Ethics research unit at Weizenbaum-Institut, and a lecturer at TU Berlin.'
Official U.S. Senate Commerce Committee press release from Chairman Ted Cruz, explicitly naming him as Chairman and documenting his AI framework announcement.
